nav_map_subtitle: Interactive view of your departure and arrival stations and travel route.
nav_map_placeholder: Map will appear when both station coordinates are resolved
scanner_subtitle: Upload a ticket photo to automatically extract train and station details.
scanner_drag_drop: or drag & drop a ticket photo
scanner_no_api_key: Gemini API key not configured. Go to Settings to add it.
scanner_error_not_image: Please upload an image file (JPEG, PNG, HEIC, etc.)
scanner_error_no_key: Please set your Gemini API key in Settings first.
form_journey_details_subtitle: Review and configure your trip details before checking in to Träwelling.
form_section_route_subtitle: Select departure and arrival stations along with travel schedule.
form_section_options_subtitle: Configure check-in visibility and travel purpose.
form_seat_comment_filled: Car and seat will be added to your Träwelling status comment.
form_seat_comment_empty: Optional — if filled, car and seat are added to the Träwelling status comment.
form_not_found: Train not auto-matched. Select from the list below or create a manual trip.
form_no_departures: No departures found in Träwelling’s database. Create a manual trip instead.
form_lookup_hint: Fetches real departures from Träwelling to get the HAFAS trip ID required for check-in.
form_autosearch_hint: Will auto-search once station, date & time are filled.
form_no_token_warning: Träwelling token not configured. Go to Settings to add it.
settings_token_placeholder: Required for checking in to Träwelling
settings_open_gemini_link: Open Google AI Studio API keys
settings_gemini_description: Required for OCR ticket scanning. Your key is stored only in your browser.
settings_station_description: Downloads the open-data JP railway stations dataset into your browser’s IndexedDB for offline autocomplete and geolocation matching.
settings_defaults_note: These defaults are applied to every check-in. You can override them per-journey in the Check-In form.
error_fill_departure: Fill in departure station and departure date/time first.
error_station_not_found: Station "{station}" not found in Träwelling. Try the English/romanised name.
error_arrival_station_not_found: Arrival station "{station}" not found in Träwelling.
error_no_token: Please configure your Träwelling token in Settings.
error_no_stations: Please set both departure and arrival stations.
error_no_datetime: Departure and arrival date/time are required.
error_arrival_before_departure_msg: Arrival date/time must be after departure.
error_no_trip: Use "Retry search" to locate the train, or create a manual trip.
error_fill_all_fields: Fill in all journey fields before creating a manual trip.
